scripts.build: rm -rf ./dist && NODE_ENV=production tsup ./src/index.ts ./src/components/atomic/index.ts ./src/components/composite/index.ts ./src/components/full/index.ts ./src/components/ui/index.ts ./src/utils/index.ts --format esm --out-dir ./dist --platform browser --external react --external react-dom --external @base-ui/react --external @excalidraw/excalidraw --external @hugeicons/core-free-icons --external @hugeicons/react --external @q9labs/chalk-ui --external @q9labs/chalk-ui/reactions --external @q9labs/chalk-whiteboard --external @q9labs/facehash --external @q9labs/facehash/react --external class-variance-authority --external clsx --external mathjax --external react-markdown --external react-resizable-panels --external sonner --external tailwind-merge && pnpm run build:fix-use-client && pnpm run build:types
scripts.build:fix-use-client: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const files=['./dist/index.js','./dist/components/atomic/index.js','./dist/components/composite/index.js','./dist/components/full/index.js','./dist/components/ui/index.js','./dist/utils/index.js'];for(const f of files){if(!fs.existsSync(f))continue;let c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');c=c.replace(/['\"]use client['\"];?\n?/g,'');c='\"use client\";\n'+c;fs.writeFileSync(f,c);}"
scripts.dev: tsup ./src/index.ts ./src/components/atomic/index.ts ./src/components/composite/index.ts ./src/components/full/index.ts ./src/components/ui/index.ts ./src/utils/index.ts --format esm --out-dir ./dist --platform browser --external react --external react-dom --external @base-ui/react --external @excalidraw/excalidraw --external @hugeicons/core-free-icons --external @hugeicons/react --external @q9labs/chalk-ui --external @q9labs/chalk-ui/reactions --external @q9labs/chalk-whiteboard --external @q9labs/facehash --external @q9labs/facehash/react --external class-variance-authority --external clsx --external mathjax --external react-markdown --external react-resizable-panels --external sonner --external tailwind-merge --watch
